seo.title: Hardwood, LVP, Tile & Laminate Flooring in Spokane | Cabinets Plus
seo.description: Shop hardwood, luxury vinyl plank, tile, and laminate flooring at Cabinets Plus in Spokane. Visit our showroom to compare styles and match your cabinets and countertops.

blocks.heading: Flooring for Spokane Homes, Picked to Last
blocks.subtext: Hardwood, luxury vinyl plank, tile, and laminate sourced from trusted suppliers. Stop by our Spokane showroom to compare wear ratings, textures, and colors alongside your cabinets and countertops.

blocks.title: Flooring That Lasts, Styled for Your Home

children.text: We stock hardwood, luxury vinyl plank, tile, and laminate from suppliers we actually trust, so you can choose what fits your space instead of compromising on durability or looks. Busy kitchen with pets and kids? LVP or tile handles the traffic. Formal living room that needs real warmth? Hardwood is still hard to beat. Basement or laundry that sees moisture? There are waterproof options built for exactly that.

Since we also carry cabinets and countertops, you can pick flooring that coordinates with the rest of your project in one visit. Bring photos, samples, or just a rough idea of the room, and we'll help you narrow the field without leaving you to guess.

blocks.title: From Sample to Install, We Make It Easy

children.text: Bring your dimensions, a floor plan sketch, or even a quick phone photo of the space and stop by the Spokane showroom. Our team will walk you through wear ratings, finishes, and which flooring types hold up where. We'll help match the flooring to the cabinets and counters you're considering so the whole room reads as a single design.

Once you pick your flooring, we offer pickup from our warehouse or delivery within the Spokane area. Cabinet and countertop installation is handled by our in-house crew; flooring itself is currently pickup or delivery only, so we'll help you line up a flooring installer or guide you through a DIY plan if that's the route you prefer.
Whether it's a single room refresh or a full remodel, we'll help you compare options honestly and avoid the surprises that come with shopping flooring alone.

blocks.title: Our partners
blocks.description: In addition to the flooring options shown in our catalog, you may also order flooring from the catalogs of the manufacturers listed below. Please discuss availability and details with our manager when placing your order.
blocks.footnote: Click on a partner logo to view their products on the official website.

blocks.title: How We Help You Pick Flooring

steps.title: Visit the Showroom
steps.description: Stop by our Spokane showroom to walk on samples, compare colors, and get a feel for different flooring types before you make a choice.

steps.title: Match the Room
steps.description: Our team talks through traffic, moisture, pets, and how the room is used so we can narrow the options to flooring that fits the space.

steps.title: Coordinate the Look
steps.description: We compare flooring samples to the cabinets and countertops you're considering so everything reads as a unified design.

steps.title: Pickup or Delivery
steps.description: Once you pick your flooring, arrange pickup from our warehouse or delivery in the Spokane area. Cabinet and countertop install is in-house; flooring install is currently pickup/delivery only.

blocks.heading: Feel the Floor Before You Buy It
blocks.subtext: Walk on hardwood, vinyl, and tile side by side at our Spokane showroom. Our team helps you compare wear ratings and coordinate the look with your cabinets and counters.

faqs.question: What flooring types do you carry?
faqs.answer: We stock hardwood, luxury vinyl plank, tile, and laminate. Visit the Spokane showroom to compare samples in person.

faqs.question: Which flooring holds up best in kitchens and baths?
faqs.answer: LVP and tile are popular choices in kitchens and baths because they handle spills and traffic well. Our team can walk you through the trade-offs based on how you use the space.

faqs.question: Can I match flooring to my cabinets and countertops?
faqs.answer: Yes—bringing flooring, cabinets, and countertops into one visit is one of the main reasons people shop with us. We'll help you coordinate finishes under the showroom lights.

faqs.question: Do you install flooring?
faqs.answer: Cabinet and countertop installation is handled by our in-house crew. Flooring is currently available for pickup or delivery within the Spokane area, so we'll help you plan a DIY install or connect with a flooring installer.

faqs.question: Can I pick up my flooring?
faqs.answer: Yes. Once your order is confirmed, pickup can be arranged at our Spokane location. Delivery in the Spokane area is also available.

faqs.question: Do you have samples to take home?
faqs.answer: Ask at the showroom. Sample availability depends on the product line, but we'll help you compare finishes in the space you're flooring.

faqs.question: Do you offer a warranty?
faqs.answer: Product warranties vary by manufacturer. We're happy to walk you through what a specific line covers during your visit.
